data.title: SaaS churn root cause — day-3 friction
data.content: Analyzed 180 churned accounts. Primary driver: onboarding friction at day-3. Users who complete the setup wizard churn at 1.2% vs 9.8% for those who don't. The drop happens at step 4.
data.linkedReason: Source data for onboarding redesign decision

data.title: Onboarding redesign — dev handoff ready
data.content: Canvas reduced onboarding from 9 steps to 5. Forge confirmed dev effort is 2 sprints. Go/no-go pending approval. Projected -22% drop-off based on similar UX changes.

data.title: Upsell signal: completed-onboarding users
data.content: Users who complete onboarding are 2.3x more likely to upgrade within 30 days. Highest-confidence upsell target. Stackz is building a dedicated campaign.
data.linkedReason: Derived from churn root cause — revenue implication

data.title: B2B ops automation gap — $4.2B TAM
data.content: Radar's Q2 intel brief: 3 competitor pricing moves signal pressure in consumer segment. B2B ops automation underserved. No player owns the 20-200 person company segment. Window is open.
data.source: Radar intelligence brief + competitor pricing alerts
data.linkedReason: Market context for NexaCore B2B pivot decision

data.title: LinkedIn outbound: 12% reply rate — early signal
data.content: Experiment 001 early signal: LinkedIn outbound to ops directors achieving 12% reply rate vs 3.4% for email cold outreach. Still 3 weeks from conclusion.
data.linkedReason: Early signal — not yet ready to act on

data.title: Sleep → decision quality: 2.3x latency increase
data.content: Cross-referenced biometric data with approval decision timestamps. On sub-7hr nights, decision latency increases 2.3x. Error rate increases 1.8x. Protecting the 9–11am cognitive peak is not optional.
data.linkedReason: Foundation for Sheldon's calendar override policy

data.title: Q2 GTM: content + outbound + integration partnerships
data.content: Three-channel strategy. Channel 1: LinkedIn content (Megaphone). Channel 2: Outbound to ops directors (Scout + Radar's ICP list). Channel 3: Integration partnerships (HubSpot, Notion, Linear). No paid ads until Q1 ROAS data is cleaner.

data.title: NexaCore B2B Pivot — Map of Content
data.content: Index for all NexaCore B2B pivot notes. Threads: Market gap analysis → Competitor intel → Unit economics → GTM strategy → Execution plan. Start here for full context on the pivot decision.
data.linkedReason: Index node for the NexaCore pivot cluster

data.title: Blaze post-mortem: marketplace cold start failure
data.content: Three root causes: 1) Supply before demand. 2) No demand subsidy — assumed organic discovery. 3) Positioning too broad. Lesson: marketplace cold start requires one side to be heavily subsidized.
data.linkedReason: Failure pattern — do not repeat in next venture

data.title: Free onboarding call → +30pt retention
data.content: Experiment 002 confirmed: Retention at day-90 is 91% for users who get an onboarding call vs 61% for self-serve. Highest-ROI intervention available at current scale.
data.linkedReason: Informs scaling decision for onboarding investment
